function.message: Handled the next inbox item successfully. I ran the four requested finance documents through the OCR/frontmatter workflow by adding structured YAML frontmatter (invoice/bill schema fields + ordered line items) to each existing file while preserving each original note body verbatim. After completion, I removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied inbox + OCR + migration workflows: selected lowest inbox item, extracted visible data only, used required finance schema fields, preserved original body text under frontmatter, made no partial/invented data changes, and deleted inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly listed four finance records for OCR workflow. Each target record contained all required schema fields and line items, enabling complete migration under 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md without guessing. All four files were updated accordingly, then the inbox file was deleted per 99_system/workflows/process-next-inbox-item.md and inbox-processing-v2-update.md.
